title: myroxylon lanceolatum
intro: Myroxylon lanceolatum, also known as the Palo Santo tree, is a species of tree native to South America and known for its fragrant wood and aromatic resin. The medicinal properties of Myroxylon lanceolatum include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Palo Santo include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Myroxylon lanceolatum include essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, and wood chips, which can be burned as incense to release its therapeutic properties.
